trendingThisWeek.title: Reasoning models are leading product copilots
trendingThisWeek.body: Teams are prioritizing structured reasoning and tool orchestration for multi-step workflows.

trendingThisWeek.title: Vision models are getting cheaper
trendingThisWeek.body: Document extraction and multimodal QA are becoming easier to justify for production teams.

trendingThisWeek.title: Agent-first coding stacks keep growing
trendingThisWeek.body: More teams are evaluating coding models through task completion and edit accuracy, not benchmarks alone.

trendingThisWeek.title: Open-weight models are winning internal pilots
trendingThisWeek.body: Enterprises are piloting open models for private deployments, custom tuning, and lower recurring inference costs.
